channel.title: Scrolls on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Scrolls on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Wayside
item.description:
M13 Listen! A sower went out to sow.
And as he sowed, some seeds fell along the path, and the birds came and devoured them.

🌞

Assume a box for the cultivated plot.
Any sowing done in its padding (near the perimeter), will have some of the seed flung, falling on the wayside.

The wayside was “field” from the beginning.
However, after many footfalls cut through the fields, that portion of arable land, was reduced to a wayside. Fallow ground + Compaction. Doubly hard.

item.title: What is Breath?
item.description:
Understanding Kingdom

👑

Do not be anxious
But, abide in Abba’s REST thus: 👇🏽
🔸in all your ways {acknowledge Him} &
🔸{Live by His Righteousness} all your days.
Seeking first the Kingdom of GOD
and His Righteousness.
All other things need not be sought:
for they will be added to you.
=> {fully supplied, there’ll be nothing left to seek}

M6:33
But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.

item.title: The King's Plea
item.description:
My son, come back home to Me.
Your departure has been killing Me, because I love you so!
I believe in you.
I have plans for you — superior to anything you can ever dream up.

My Scribe, se7en, will tell you what’s on My Heart.
Please, let Me save you.
It’s your choice: make it count.

item.title: Building the City
item.description:
There’s a kind of statement in the canon, that we have to understand. So profound, indeed, that its ramifications are beyond words. Behold, 👇🏾

Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus, …
… But we have the mind of Christ
that you put off, concerning your former conduct, the old man which grows corrupt according to the deceitful lusts, and be renewed in the spirit of your mind.

item.title: Outflow of Life
item.description:
Monday • 10.06.24

Seek first the KING’s Business and His ‘Standard to Live by.’

The provision promised in section M633 is not strange. Rather, it is commonplace, like these which are provided on earth, with examples all around you. 👇🏾

  • Staff School {best quality education for your children}
  • Staff Quarters {fully-furnished}
  • Office Supplies {do the KING’s business with HIS resources}
  • Health Centre & Insurance {your family is wholly covered}
  • Company Vehicle & Driver {maintenance & fueling of vehicle is covered}
  • Chef, Servants & Security {angelic helpers, co-labourers; watchers & warriors}
  • Travel allowance {national, international}
  • Paid Leave & sponsored Vacations {fully paid everything with extra stipend}
  • Office Canteen/Dining
  • Salary
  • Bonuses
  • Gratuity
  • Sponsorship for further Education
  • Sponsored Trainings & Conferences
  • Scholarship for your dependents
  • EVERYTHING {including what you haven’t even thought you’d need}

All these and more are wholly covered/sponsored by Governments & Multinationals for their staff; and even so much more for their Ambassadors & Expatriates respectively.
